AdminScenarioStats.description: Aggregate activity on one scenario across every player.
AdminScenarioStats.title: AdminScenarioStats

AdminUserStats.description: Aggregate activity for one identity: a registered user or a guest session.
AdminUserStats.title: AdminUserStats

CatalogOut.description: Everything a client home/explore screen needs in one call.
CatalogOut.title: CatalogOut

GuestAuthResponse.description: A bearer token for an account-less session (native-app guest mode).
GuestAuthResponse.title: GuestAuthResponse

PlayerView.description: The only turn payload play endpoints may return — gm_state never leaks here.
PlayerView.title: PlayerView

PlaythroughAnalysis.description: LLM output schema for the post-game analysis of the player's choices.
PlaythroughAnalysis.title: PlaythroughAnalysis

PlaythroughListItem.description: A playthrough in the cross-scenario library list, titled for display.
PlaythroughListItem.title: PlaythroughListItem

ScenarioContent.description:
The play-relevant scenario fields, as snapshotted into a playthrough.

roles/npcs stay plain dicts so prompt code treats live rows and snapshots alike.
ScenarioContent.title: ScenarioContent

ScenarioDraft.description: LLM output schema for the AI-expand builder.
ScenarioDraft.title: ScenarioDraft

ScenarioProgress.description:
LLM output schema for the how-am-I-doing analysis across all of a player's
finished runs of one scenario.
ScenarioProgress.title: ScenarioProgress

ScenarioStats.description: One player's aggregate record on one scenario.
ScenarioStats.title: ScenarioStats

ScenarioUpdateAdminOut.description: Draft/any update as the admin review UI sees it: proposed vs current content.
ScenarioUpdateAdminOut.title: ScenarioUpdateAdminOut

ScenarioUpdateOut.description: Published situation-log entry, visible to players.
ScenarioUpdateOut.title: ScenarioUpdateOut

post.description:
Promote a scenario to living (which also shares it in the library) or demote it.

Demoting keeps the scenario and its published log; the daily pass just stops
proposing updates for it.

get.description:
High-level overview of every identity's activity and every scenario's uptake.

Aggregation happens in Python over one playthrough-level query — fine at this
app's scale and much simpler than a lattice of GROUP BYs.
Per-scenario breakdown for one identity — the drill-down under a user row.

post.description:
Sign in (or up) with a verified Apple identity token. Matches by Apple subject
first, then links by email, then creates an account — new accounts claim the
caller's guest session exactly like register does.

A fresh account-less identity as a bearer token — the native-app counterpart of
the browser's guest cookie. Registering later while sending this token upgrades the
session to the new account, content included.

Revoke the presented refresh token. Best-effort by design: an unknown token is
already logged out, so there is nothing to reveal by failing.

delete.description:
Permanently delete the account and everything it owns (App Store requires this
in-app). Explicit deletes child-first rather than relying on DB cascades, so the
behavior is identical on every backend.

post.description: Rotate the refresh token and mint a fresh access JWT.

Always 202 with the same message — whether the account exists, and whether the
send was rate-limited, must not be observable (email enumeration).

get.description:
The shared catalog in one call: the featured shelf, live scenarios, and the
library grouped by category — what a home/explore screen renders.

Every playthrough the caller owns, across all scenarios — the library's
saved-sessions list (continue playing, completed runs).
The player-facing situation log: published updates only, newest first.
